title: hieracium alpinum subsp. alpinum
intro: Hieracium alpinum subsp. alpinum, also known as Alpine Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Alpine Hawkweed include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Alpine Hawkweed can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to promote overall well-being.
